config.exam_name: 09 Legacy Hive Metastore Catalog in Databricks

question.line: Before Unity Catalog was introduced, what was the default catalog used by Databricks?
Which namespace format is used by the Hive Metastore?
If no schema is specified when creating a table in the Hive Metastore, where is the table created?
Which statement correctly describes a managed table in the Hive Metastore?

options.A: The user must always specify the storage location.
options.B: Databricks manages both the table metadata and the physical data files.
options.C: Only metadata is managed by Databricks.
options.D: Data is always stored in Azure Blob Storage chosen by the user.
options.E: Managed tables cannot use Delta Lake.

question.line: Where are managed table data files stored by default in the Hive Metastore?
What is the primary difference between a managed table and an external table?

options.A: Managed tables support SQL while external tables do not.
options.B: Managed tables require Unity Catalog, while external tables require Hive Metastore.
options.C: External tables require a user-defined storage location, while managed tables do not.
options.D: Managed tables cannot store structured data.

question.line: What happens when a managed table is dropped?

options.B: Only the physical data is removed.
options.C: Both the metadata and physical data files are deleted.
options.D: The table becomes an external table.
options.E: The table is converted into a view.

question.line: What happens when an external table is dropped?

options.A: Both metadata and data files are deleted.
options.B: Only the metadata is removed while the data files remain.
options.C: The table is moved to the Hive Metastore default schema.
options.E: The storage location is automatically deleted.

question.line: Why can an external table be recreated after it has been dropped?

options.A: The metadata is automatically restored by Spark.
options.B: The table definition is stored in Azure Active Directory.
options.C: The physical data remains in the specified external storage location.
options.D: Unity Catalog recreates the table automatically.
options.E: Delta Lake permanently stores every dropped table.

question.line: Which statement best describes a view in the Hive Metastore?

options.A: A view stores a physical copy of the underlying table data.
options.B: A view stores only a SQL query and does not duplicate the underlying data.
options.C: A view can only be queried once.
options.D: A view automatically creates a Delta table.
options.E: A view cannot persist after restarting the compute cluster.
